allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add player and team profile pages

- Add player profile page \(/cau-thu/[id]\) with stats, transfers, trophies
- Add team profile page \(/doi-bong/[id]\) with squad, season stats, recent matches
- Add API endpoints for player and team data
- Link players in KeyPlayers component to their profile pages
- Support for Vietnamese translations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
style: improve soi-keo page layout

- Increase club logo size from 20px to 40px
- Make team names more prominent \(font-semibold\)
- Reduce odds badge size for better balance
- Add 2-column grid layout on large screens
- Better date/time display in center

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: use league logo images in soi-keo page

Replace text flags \(ES, IT, DE, FR\) with actual league logo images
in the header, breadcrumb, and filter buttons.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: add photos for coaches and top scorers + fix current coach selection

- Add coach photo from API-Football /coachs endpoint
- Fix coach selection to find current coach \(career entry with no end date\)
- Add player id and photo to top scorers data
- Update UI to display coach photos and top scorer photos
- Make top scorers clickable to player profiles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
